title: Invisible History: Middle Florida's Hidden Roots
original_title: Invisible History: Middle Florida's Hidden Roots
overview: This film sheds light on the little-known history of plantations and the enslaved in North Florida. It seeks to advance a sense of place and identity for thousands of African-Americans by exploring the invisible history of slavery in Leon County.
